description: ThousandEyes capabilities for K-12 schools, colleges, universities, online learning platforms, and educational institutions

common_requirements.requirement: LMS platform monitoring (Canvas, Blackboard, Moodle, D2L)
common_requirements.answer: Yes. ThousandEyes monitors learning management systems including Canvas, Blackboard, Moodle, and D2L for availability and performance.

common_requirements.requirement: Online exam and assessment platform monitoring
common_requirements.answer: Yes. ThousandEyes monitors exam platforms for availability, performance, and user experience during critical testing windows.
Yes. ThousandEyes monitors Zoom connectivity including video quality, audio performance, and meeting reliability through VoIP metrics.
Yes. ThousandEyes monitors Microsoft Teams for availability, call quality, and collaboration tool performance.
Yes. ThousandEyes monitors Google Classroom and Google Meet for availability, performance, and video quality.
Yes. ThousandEyes provides end-to-end network visibility across multiple campus locations with WAN performance monitoring.

common_requirements.requirement: Dormitory and student housing WiFi monitoring
common_requirements.answer: Yes. ThousandEyes Endpoint Agents monitor WiFi performance including signal strength, roaming, and application connectivity in dorms.

common_requirements.requirement: Library and computer lab network monitoring
common_requirements.answer: Yes. ThousandEyes monitors network performance and application access in library and lab environments.
Yes. ThousandEyes monitors SIS platforms including Ellucian Banner, PowerSchool, and student portals for availability and performance.
Yes. ThousandEyes monitors enrollment systems with synthetic testing for critical registration periods and peak load times.
Yes. ThousandEyes monitors financial aid platforms and application workflows for availability and transaction completion.
Yes. ThousandEyes monitors research network connections including Internet2 and ESnet for performance and availability.
Yes. ThousandEyes monitors network connectivity to HPC clusters and research computing resources.
Yes. ThousandEyes monitors Google Workspace including Gmail, Drive, Docs, and Classroom for education users.
Yes. ThousandEyes monitors Microsoft 365 Education including Teams, OneDrive, and Office applications.

common_requirements.requirement: Cloud storage monitoring (OneDrive, Google Drive, Dropbox)
common_requirements.answer: Yes. ThousandEyes monitors cloud storage platforms for upload/download performance and file sync reliability.
Partial. ThousandEyes maintains security controls and audit logging supporting FERPA requirements; specific compliance validation needed.
Partial. ThousandEyes does not collect student data directly; COPPA compliance depends on deployment and data handling practices.
Yes. ThousandEyes Endpoint Agents monitor remote student connectivity including home WiFi, VPN, and application access.
Yes. ThousandEyes monitors VPN performance including connection quality, latency, and throughput for student and faculty access.
Yes. ThousandEyes monitors digital library platforms and databases for availability and access performance.
Yes. ThousandEyes monitors e-book platforms for availability, download speeds, and user access.
Yes. ThousandEyes monitors Salesforce Education Cloud for CRM, recruitment, and student engagement applications.
Yes. ThousandEyes integrates with ServiceNow for automated incident creation and IT service management.
Yes. ThousandEyes supports hybrid deployment with on-premise Enterprise Agents while platform remains cloud-based.
Yes. ThousandEyes offers educational pricing programs for qualifying academic institutions; contact sales for details.
Yes. ThousandEyes provides documentation, training materials, and support resources for educational institutions.
